note: Response Drafts tab (v3.0) encoded losslessly as templates + per-draft params. Bodies in the sheet are identical within a response type except the greeting name. Rebuilt by scripts/build-data.mjs. 62 drafts = 57 viable + 5 polite declines; 3 do-not-engage deals (0029, 0034, 0049) have no draft.
signature:
Best,
Aaron
Talent Manager for Noe Varner

posted.label: Active — posted sponsorship (3-content package)
posted.subject: Re: Partnership with Noe Varner — {brand}
posted.body: Hi {name} — Aaron here. I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Thanks for reaching out about working with Noe. Noe's sponsored partnerships generally begin with a three-content campaign — typically a product introduction, a demonstration or use-case piece, and a results/comparison post — which gives the brand enough repetition to introduce, demonstrate, and reinforce the message with his audience. The base investment for organic creation and posting starts at $3,000, with paid usage, licensing, whitelisting, exclusivity, and additional platforms quoted separately on top. To tailor a proposal, could you share your goals, target timeline, and whether you need any paid-media or usage rights beyond organic posting? I'll come back with a structured quote.

exception.label: Strategic exception — EXCEPTION REQUIRES AARON APPROVAL
exception.subject: Re: Partnership with Noe Varner — {brand}
exception.body: Hi {name} — Aaron here. I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Appreciate the outreach — this is an interesting opportunity, and we want to structure it correctly. Noe's sponsored partnerships generally begin with a three-content campaign — typically a product introduction, a demonstration or use-case piece, and a results/comparison post — which gives the brand enough repetition to introduce, demonstrate, and reinforce the message with his audience. The base investment for organic creation and posting starts at $3,000, with paid usage, licensing, whitelisting, exclusivity, and additional platforms quoted separately on top. Because your request appears to involve extended usage rights (such as paid media, whitelisting, licensing, or name/likeness/AI rights), those are handled as separate line items and, in some cases, require additional legal and commercial review before we can quote. Could you confirm the exact usage scope, term, territory, and whether any perpetual, exclusivity, or likeness/AI rights are involved? Nothing is agreed until those terms are defined in writing.

affiliate.label: Affiliate / revenue-share counter
affiliate.subject: Re: Partnership with Noe Varner — {brand}
affiliate.body: Hi {name} — Aaron here. I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Thanks for reaching out. Noe is selective about affiliate-only arrangements; we're open to a partnership that pairs a guaranteed base fee with commission on top. Could you share the product, commission rate, and attribution/cookie window? If Noe would also be posting on his own channels, note that his organic sponsored partnerships start at a $3,000 base package (three-content), with affiliate commission layered on top of that.

ugc.label: UGC-only production (separate production + licensing)
ugc.subject: Re: Partnership with Noe Varner — {brand}
ugc.body: Hi {name} — Aaron here. I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Happy to explore a UGC production for you. For content Noe produces but does not publish on his own channels, we quote a production fee separately from any usage rights. Could you confirm the deliverable specs, and the intended usage — platforms, duration, territory, editing rights, and whether you need paid-media/whitelisting? The production fee covers creation only; licensing and paid usage are priced on top based on scope. This keeps Noe's likeness and identity rights protected and clearly defined.

retainer.label: Retainer / ambassador (recurring)
retainer.subject: Re: Partnership with Noe Varner — {brand}
retainer.body: Hi {name} — Aaron here. I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Appreciate you thinking of Noe for an ongoing partnership. To scope a retainer, could you share the monthly deliverables, whether the work posts on Noe's own channels or requires separate/anonymous accounts or UGC production, the expected duration, and your monthly budget? We'll structure a monthly rate and confirm scope before committing — we evaluate recurring offers on their confirmed monthly value, not on assumed annual totals.

decline.label: Polite decline (relationship-preserving)
decline.subject: Re: {brand} x Noe Varner
decline.body: Hi {name} — Aaron here, I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Thank you for thinking of Noe for this. After a look, it isn't quite the right fit for his audience and content focus right now, so we'll pass on this occasion. We genuinely appreciate the outreach and would be glad to stay in touch if something more aligned comes up in the future. Wishing you a successful campaign.

event.label: Event / interview / consulting / advisory
event.subject: Re: Partnership with Noe Varner — {brand}
event.body: Hi {name} — Aaron here. I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Thanks for the invitation. For events, interviews, webinars, or advisory work, we quote based on format, prep, time commitment, and any travel. Could you share the date, format, audience, time required, and whether any content rights or recordings are involved? I'll come back with a fee tailored to the engagement.

licensing.label: Paid-ad creative / licensing (separate fees)
licensing.subject: Re: Partnership with Noe Varner — {brand}
licensing.body: Hi {name} — Aaron here. I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Thanks for the outreach. For ad creative or licensed content, we separate the production fee from the media-usage/licensing fee. Could you share the intended platforms, campaign duration, territory, and whether this includes whitelisting, Spark Ads, or paid-media amplification? I'll quote a production fee plus a licensing fee scoped to your usage. Nothing is agreed until the usage terms are confirmed.

rawDrafts.subject: Re: Paid Collab — Teamily AI
rawDrafts.body: Hi Iris — Aaron here. I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Happy to look at Teamily AI. Two things up front: this came through in a batch with a couple of other brands, so confirm AhaCreator is the authorized rep for Teamily specifically, and note that Noe doesn't work on split upfront/after-post payment terms. Noe's sponsored work starts with a three-content package, base $3,000 for organic creation and posting; usage, paid media, licensing, and exclusivity are quoted separately on top. Send me the budget, deliverables, and timeline and I'll put together a structured quote. Best, Aaron — Talent Manager for Noe Varner

rawDrafts.subject: Re: VibeHost x Noe Varner
rawDrafts.body:
Hi Yvonne — Aaron here. I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Thanks for reaching out. The affiliate structure is fine as a layer, but Noe prices content creation separately from any commission — the two aren't a substitute for each other. Before we scope anything, a couple of things: what's the budget for the content itself, and what deliverables and platforms are you after? Also, quick check — you're emailing from gntc.com, so confirm you're the authorized VibeHost rep and I'll move fast. Send those over and I'll come back with a structured quote.

Best,
Aaron
Talent Manager for Noe Varner

rawDrafts.subject: Re: Paid Collaboration with Merlin AI
rawDrafts.body:
Hi Evelyn — Aaron here. I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Happy to look at this. Noe's sponsored work starts with a three-content package, and the base for organic creation and posting is $3,000. Usage, paid media, licensing, and exclusivity are quoted separately on top. Before we share analytics, one housekeeping item: the note was signed "Piyush" and comes from a zenithfield.org address, so confirm you're the authorized Merlin AI contact. Then send me the budget, deliverables, and timeline and I'll put together a quote.

Best,
Aaron
Talent Manager for Noe Varner

rawDrafts.subject: Re: Paid Opportunity - Noe Varner x Similarweb
rawDrafts.body:
Hi Rachel — Aaron here, Noe looped me in. I manage his brand partnerships, so I'll take it from here on scope and rates. Noe's sponsored work starts with a three-content package, base $3,000 for organic creation and posting; usage, paid media, licensing, and exclusivity are separate line items on top. Tell me your goals, timeline, deliverables, and whether you need any paid-media or usage rights beyond organic, and I'll send back a structured quote.

rawDrafts.subject: Re: Brand Sponsorship Opportunity with Higgsfield.Ai
rawDrafts.body:
Hi Palak — Aaron here. I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Thanks for reaching out. To be upfront, we're seeing Higgsfield come through more than one agency, so before we lock anything in I'll need to confirm Jeevmedia is the authorized route for this campaign. On rates: Noe's sponsored work starts with a three-content package, base $3,000 for organic creation and posting; a single Reel plus a 7-day link in bio would sit inside that. Usage and any paid media are quoted separately. Confirm the authorization and your budget and I'll send a full quote.

Best,
Aaron
Talent Manager for Noe Varner

rawDrafts.subject: Re: Collaboration Opportunity - Rocket Jobs
rawDrafts.body:
Hi there — Aaron here, I manage Noe Varner's brand partnerships. Thanks for the invitation via Social Cat. After a look, Rocket Jobs isn't the right fit for Noe's audience and content focus right now, so we'll pass on this one. We appreciate the outreach and are glad to stay in touch if something more aligned with the AI and tech space comes up. Wishing you a strong campaign.

Best,
Aaron
Talent Manager for Noe Varner

rawDrafts.subject: Ring PRO collab
rawDrafts.body: Hey Gaurav - appreciate you reaching out, I'm a fan of what Ultrahuman is building. Happy to look at a Ring PRO collab. Shoot me a quick brief: what you want covered, timing, and the budget you're working with. For reference, sponsored content on my channels starts at a 3-post package, and the ring itself we'd treat separately from the fee. What's your email and I'll send over my one-pager?

rawDrafts.subject: Paid post + affiliate
rawDrafts.body: Thanks for the offer. Upfront + ongoing commission can work, but I keep the paid post and the affiliate as two separate lines - the post is priced on its own (my posts start at 1k each, 3-post minimum), and the 12-month commission sits on top. Send me the upfront number you had in mind and the affiliate terms and I'll tell you quickly if we're in the same ballpark.

rawDrafts.subject: Sponsored video
rawDrafts.body: Happy to help. Quick version of my rates: sponsored content runs as a 3-post package, 3k minimum for an organic campaign, and any usage/paid amplification is priced on top. If you tell me the product, the goal, and where you want it to run, I'll put together a tailored number. What's the best email for the details?

rawDrafts.subject: Roster / representation
rawDrafts.body: Hey Thomas - thanks for thinking of me. I'm selective about representation, so before anything else: what's your commission structure, which brands do you actively place, and what would you commit to bringing in over the first 90 days? Send that over and we can figure out if it's a fit.

rawDrafts.subject: Partnership feeler
rawDrafts.body: Hey Nick - happy to chat. What did you have in mind, and is there a budget attached? Once I know the product and the ask I can tell you fast whether it's something I'd take on.

rawDrafts.subject: Affiliate / free access
rawDrafts.body: Thanks - happy to test the tool. Just so we're clear up front: free access is fine for me to try it, but any content I actually post is paid separately (starts at 1k/post), and the affiliate cut sits on top of that. If that works, send me the access and the commission terms.

rawDrafts.subject: Free access trial
rawDrafts.body: Appreciate it. I'll take a look at the tool - no promises on coverage though. If I do end up featuring it, that's a paid placement (starts at 1k/post). Send the access over and I'll have a play.

rawDrafts.subject: Paid promo inquiry
rawDrafts.body: Hey - yes, open to paid promo. What's the product, what are you looking for exactly, and what's the budget? My posts start at 1k each. Give me those three and I'll come back quick.

rawDrafts.subject: Higgsfield - which route
rawDrafts.body: Hey Abylay - good to hear from the Higgsfield side directly. Quick check before we go further: I may already be lined up on a Higgsfield campaign through Heek/BDSJ. Can you confirm whether your Claude MCP campaign is the same thing or separate? Want to make sure we're not crossing wires on scope or rates. Once that's clear I'll send numbers.

rawDrafts.subject: Houston - session + collab
rawDrafts.body: Hey Felipe - locked in for the session (Jul 16/21 works). On the paid collab side, let's talk specifics after: what you're picturing, timing, and budget. My content runs as a 3-post package with a 3k minimum, usage priced separately. Looking forward to it.
